en.extract:
The Mauritius cuckooshrike (Lalage typica) is a species of bird in the family Campephagidae. It is endemic to Mauritius.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss.


References


External links
BirdLife Species Factsheet.

The '''Mauritius cuckooshrike''' ('''''Lalage typica''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Campephagidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Mauritius]].

Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].

zh.extract:
毛里求斯鹃鵙（学名：Coracina typica）是山椒鸟科鸦鹃鵙属的一种，为毛里求斯的特有种。其自然栖息地为亚热带或热带的湿润低地森林。该物种受栖息地减少威胁。


参考文献

BirdLife International. Coracina typica. The IUCN Red List of Threatened Species 2009.   [2010-10-27] （英语）.
